answers.label: Undergraduate (studying for or completed a Bachelor's)
I like helping, teaching, or supporting people
Outdoors or on-site (field, site, lab, clinic)
Fulfillment first — purpose matters more than pay
I want to run my own business / freelance
I'm open to assistant/support roles while I decide

steps.title: Foundations

children.title: Industry Fundamentals

tasks.description: Gain relevant assistant or support work experience in mental health or clinical settings
